emails.subject: CNG Parking Deal
emails.body: CNG Parking Deal We are parking 4,875 dth/day for the 27th-30th on CNG (deal 281565) and we are taking out 478 dth/day for the month of June (deal 281565). ENA is paying CNG $.04 times the total volume parked. Angie, these volumes may go up. I think Tenn is still trying to balance the weekend and they are a little long. Clarissa will let you know.

emails.subject: Re: CNG Parking Deal
emails.body: Re: CNG Parking Deal Chris, It depends when we pay the fee, but if it is on the way out we would just make the commodity fee .04 cents. David Chris Germany 05/31/2000 11:44 AM
